agent.name: Gap Analysis Agent
agent.description: Reviews the Requirement Summary produced by the Requirement Agent and identifies missing, ambiguous, conflicting, or incomplete requirements before BA documentation begins.

input.description: Requirement Summary document from the Requirement Agent plus optional prior-version for comparison

required_fields.description: ID of the project being analysed
ID of the Requirement Summary document to analyse
Full markdown content of the Requirement Summary

optional_fields.description: ID of a prior Requirement Summary version for change-comparison gap analysis
Markdown content of the previous version (required when previous_document_id is provided)
Additional context or focus areas supplied by the user (e.g. 'focus on approval flow gaps')

constraints: content_markdown maximum length: 32,000 characters per call
project_id must reference an existing project
requirement_document_id must reference a document of type requirement_summary

output.description: Structured Gap Analysis Report saved to the documents table

sections.description: Executive summary: total gaps found, severity breakdown, and recommendation to proceed or hold

sections.trigger_rule: Raise an Approval Gap whenever a requirement mentions approval, authorisation, or sign-off but does not specify: Approval Level, Approver Role, SLA, or Escalation Rule

sections.description: Prioritised list of questions to be answered by the user or BA before work continues
Actionable recommendations (e.g. 'Hold BA phase until approval flow is clarified')

severity_levels.definition: Blocks design or development from starting; must be resolved before BA phase
Significant risk to scope or quality; should be resolved before BA phase
Notable gap that may cause rework; should be clarified during BA phase
Minor ambiguity or assumption that can be resolved during development

responsibilities: Review every functional and non-functional requirement for completeness
Identify Missing requirements not stated but implied by business context
Flag Ambiguous requirements that have more than one reasonable interpretation
Detect Conflicts between two or more requirements
Spot Duplicate requirements that describe the same behaviour
Identify unclear Dependencies between requirements or external systems
Check for Integration gaps where an external system is mentioned but not specified
Check for Data gaps where entities or fields are mentioned but not defined
Check for Security gaps (authentication, authorisation, encryption, audit)
Apply the Approval Gap rule to every approval-related requirement
Check for Reporting gaps where dashboards or reports are implied but not specified
Generate a prioritised list of clarification questions for the user or BA
Do NOT resolve gaps silently — every gap must be visible in the report

on_success.condition: Proceed to BA Agent. If critical_gap_count > 0, flag for user review before BA phase.

on_failure.message: Gap Analysis Agent failed to produce a report. Please review the Requirement Summary and retry.

office_behaviour.chat_bubble_on_handoff: Gap analysis complete. {critical_gap_count} critical gap(s) found. Passing to BA Agent.
